hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.go$'; then make fmt 2>/dev/null; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(env|key|pem|secret)$'; then echo 'BLOCK: Refusing to edit sensitive file' >&2; exit 2; fi
